name: Bee Hummingbird
lifestyle: The smallest bird in the world, famous for hovering flight and rapid wingbeats.
behavior: Very active, territorial around flowers, and extremely fast-moving.
special_fact: It is widely known as the smallest living bird species.

name: Costa's Hummingbird
lifestyle: A tiny hummingbird adapted to dry desert environments.
behavior: Fast, energetic, and known for dramatic courtship displays.
special_fact: Males have a beautiful purple crown and throat.
